narrative.summary: Hi-fi listening bar + pour-over concept; DJ booth meets coffee bar; flagship opened summer 2024; uses SEY/La Cabra + in-house roast.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "One of the most beautiful coffee shops I've ever seen! They have Nintendo figurines, a spacious seating area, and expert baristas. I ordered a hojicha latte and my partner ordered a regular latte. Both lattes were deliciously smooth and well made.

The best part of this coffee shop is again the vibes and atmosphere. It has a long narrow and deep space, but it goes really deep. As in this cafe looks bigger than than you think once you move further down the place.

I really enjoyed the overall feeling I got from being here and again the vibes here are amazing. Great place to study or hangout with friends!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Quite rare to find a coffee shop like this that opens early! Been here several times and the drinks and service have been top notch.

It's generally packed inside so YMMV if you can secure a spot. Come early enough, and there will be plenty around.

The music being played by these gigantic vintage speakers further bring out the uniqueness of this cafe too. If you prefer a quieter environment, the seats in the far back are your best bet."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Beautiful and cozy cafe with variety of sitting and relaxing atmosphere. Love that you can enjoy coffee for several hours, there’s no rush and no haste."
